courses.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

timeline.title: KDD Cup 2025 Participant
timeline.summary: Participating in KDD Cup 2025 hosted by HKUST Guangzhou Campus - a Data Agent construction competition.
highlights: Building intelligent Data Agent systems for real-world data analysis tasks.

timeline.title: High-Frequency Prediction Competition
timeline.summary: Participated in Lingjun Quant's high-frequency prediction competition.
highlights: First hands-on experience with neural networks in a real-world trading scenario.
Rank was not high, but gained valuable practical ML experience.

timeline.title: Social Practice Team Member
timeline.summary: Participated in a social practice team to Huzhou for community research and service activities.
highlights: Awarded Zhejiang University Outstanding Social Practice Team (University-level honor).
Conducted field research on local community development as a team member.

timeline.title: Best Debater, Danqing Debate Team
timeline.summary: Active member and award-winning debater in the university debate team in 2023.
highlights: Multiple awards as Best Debater in inter-collegiate debate competitions.
Participated in various debate tournaments and public speaking events.

timeline.title: Software Development Engineer
timeline.summary: Full-stack software development for elevator management systems.
highlights: Developing and maintaining enterprise-level software solutions.
Building data-driven applications with modern tech stack.

timeline.title: Summer Researcher
timeline.company: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
timeline.summary: Summer research program in Bayesian statistics under Prof. Rong Tang.
highlights: Explored theoretical foundations of Bayesian inference methods.
Gained exposure to advanced statistical computing techniques.

timeline.title: Research Assistant
timeline.summary: Research on algorithmic problems in SQL-based data pricing.
highlights: Investigated pricing algorithms for query-based data markets.
Developed optimization methods for SQL query pricing computation.

timeline.title: Visiting Student
timeline.summary: Short-term academic visit to the Department of Mathematics.
highlights: Participated in academic seminars and research discussions.
Explored advanced topics in mathematical analysis and statistics.

timeline.title: Research Trainee
timeline.summary: Research training program on AI's impact on service industries.
highlights: Analyzed the transformative effects of artificial intelligence on service sectors.
Conducted literature reviews and empirical studies on technology adoption.
